    public partial class OrderProjectionBuilder : IOrderProjectionBuilder
    {
        protected override async global::System.Threading.Tasks.Task<bool> DispatchAsync(
            global::Edict.Contracts.Events.EdictEvent edictEvent)
        {
            switch (edictEvent)
            {
                case global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent typed:
                {
                    var parentContext = global::Edict.Telemetry.ActivityExtensions.RestoreFromStrings(edictEvent.TraceId, edictEvent.SpanId, edictEvent.TraceState);
                    using var span = global::Edict.Telemetry.ActivitySourceExtensions.StartEdictEventHandle(global::Edict.Telemetry.EdictDiagnostics.ActivitySource, "OrderPlacedEvent", parentContext);
                    if (span is not null && this.ServiceProvider.GetService(typeof(global::Edict.Telemetry.IEventTagWriters)) is global::Edict.Telemetry.IEventTagWriters __writers && __writers.TryGet(typeof(global::Sample.OrderPlacedEvent), out var __write)) { __write(typed, span); }
                    await DispatchEventAsync(typed, HandleAsync);
                    return true;
                }
                default:
                    return false;
            }
        }
